metadata.name: NetBox Virtual Machine
metadata.description: Registers a virtual machine in NetBox with cluster, site, and host device associations. Defines VM metadata including resource allocation and optional IPAM integration.

items.name: resource_name
items.title: Resource Name
items.description: Terraform resource name.

items.name: vm_name
items.title: Virtual machine name
items.description: Name to use for the virtual machine.

items.name: cluster_name
items.title: Cluster name
items.description: Existing NetBox cluster name to resolve via data source.

items.name: status
items.title: VM status
items.description: Value used for the virtual machine configuration settings.

items.name: site_name
items.title: Site Name
items.description: Existing NetBox site name to resolve via data source (leave empty to skip)

items.name: device_name
items.title: Device Name
items.description: Existing NetBox device name for host assignment (leave empty to skip)

items.name: ipam_enabled
items.title: IPAM
items.description: Enable IP address assignment

items.name: interface_name
items.title: Network interface name
items.description: Name to use for the network interface.

items.name: primary_ip4
items.title: Primary IPv4
items.description: Primary IPv4 address with CIDR notation

items.name: dns_name
items.title: DNS Name
items.description: DNS name for the IP address (leave empty to skip)

items.name: resources_enabled
items.title: Resources
items.description: Enable or disable specify resource allocation.

items.name: vcpus
items.title: vCPUs
items.description: Number of virtual CPUs

items.name: memory_mb
items.title: Memory
items.description: Memory allocation in MB

items.name: disk_gb
items.title: Disk Size
items.description: Disk size in GB

items.name: description_enabled
items.title: Description
items.description: Add VM description

items.name: description_text
items.title: VM description
items.description: Description for the vm.

items.name: depends_on_enabled
items.title: Dependencies
items.description: Enable resource dependencies

items.name: dependencies
items.title: Dependencies
items.description: Comma-separated list of resource dependencies

items.name: lifecycle_enabled
items.title: Lifecycle
items.description: Enable lifecycle rules

items.name: prevent_destroy
items.title: Prevent resource destruction
items.description: Prevent Terraform from destroying the resource.

items.name: create_before_destroy
items.title: Precreate
items.description: Create replacement before destroying

items.name: ignore_changes
items.title: Ignore Changes
items.description: Comma-separated list of attributes to ignore changes for
